STATEMENT OF WORK #001

Between: TechStartup Inc ("Client")
And: Widget Manufacturing Co ("Contractor")
Effective Date: February 15, 2026
Expiration Date: May 15, 2026

1. SCOPE OF WORK
Contractor shall design and manufacture 50 custom PCB prototypes per specifications
attached as Exhibit A.

2. DELIVERABLES
2.1 Initial design review: March 1, 2026
2.2 First prototype batch (10 units): April 1, 2026
2.3 Final batch (40 units): May 1, 2026

3. COMPENSATION
Total fixed fee: $125,000
Payment: 50% upon execution, 25% on first delivery, 25% on final delivery.

6. TERMINATION
Either party may terminate for material breach with 10 business days written notice
and opportunity to cure.

8. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
Contractor's total liability shall not exceed the total SOW value ($125,000).
Neither party shall be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

9. GOVERNING LAW
This SOW shall be governed by the laws of the State of California.
